Per Rule C, Saga-only data with real authoritative content = 3 not 2. The see_also venues are mostly general museums, not kiln/workshop venues. Hakata Ori (weaving) is irrelevant to pottery. The response itself flags the coverage gap via routing_hint suggesting get_traditional_arts. Factual accuracy is good but Hakata Ori appearing in a pottery query is a minor noise issue (Rule B: single dim hit on coverage).

Actual kiln/workshop visit venues (窯元) with addresses and visiting hours are absent — the see_also venues are general museums, not pottery kilns.

reasoning: The user asked about traditional festivals in the Tohoku region (도호쿠 지방), but the tool was called only for Aomori prefecture — one of six Tohoku prefectures. This is a coverage/retrieval failure: Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, and Fukushima festivals (e.g., Sendai Tanabata, Akita Kanto, Yamagata Hanagasa) are entirely absent. The national_heritage section is dominated by non-Tohoku festivals (Saitama, Aichi, Gifu, Mie, Chiba, etc.) which are irrelevant noise. The Korean language output is correct per RULE D so no constraint penalty. Per RULE C, the Aomori data returned is real and authoritative, so dims are 3 not 2 for the partial data, but intent and usefulness are 2 because the bulk of the requested region is missing.
missing_data: Festivals from Iwate (Hayachine Kagura is present but mislabeled scope), Miyagi (Sendai Tanabata), Akita (Kanto Matsuri, Nishimonai Bon Odori), Yamagata (Hanagasa Matsuri), and Fukushima prefectures are entirely absent. Region-wide fan-out was not applied (region_fanout_applied: false).
wrong_data: The national_heritage section includes many non-Tohoku festivals (Kawagoe/Saitama, Toyama, Mie, Aichi, Gifu, Chiba, Oita, Tochigi) presented alongside Aomori results, which is misleading for a Tohoku-focused query. Dainichido Bugaku is in Akita, not Aomori, yet appears in an Aomori query result.
improvement_hint: Implement region-level fan-out: when prefecture maps to a known region (Tohoku = Aomori, Iwate, Miyagi, Akita, Yamagata, Fukushima), automatically query all six prefectures and merge results. Filter national_heritage to only show items geographically within the queried region.
